strengths: 13+ years of full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems
Exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at current role (re:cinq)
High-throughput microservices experience (millions of HTTP req/s at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
concerns: No evidence of executive leadership or scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+
Lacks demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems experience in regulated/high-stakes contexts
No fintech-infrastructure depth in credit risk, working-capital, or trade decisioning

key_factors.factor: Executive leadership & team scaling track record
Distributed systems and high-throughput backend depth

response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned senior individual contributor with strong full-stack and distributed-systems credentials and emerging exposure to agentic AI tooling, but the resume does not evidence the executive-level leadership, team-scaling history, production multi-agent AI operation, or fintech credit/risk infrastructure depth that this CTO role requires.
